title: Delegation status chip
notes: Colour-coded chip for the four effective delegation states (pending / active / expired / revoked). Used in every delegation list + show screen + the shell's delegate-received indicator.
The state is DERIVED from starts_at + ends_at + revoked_at — do not read a state column (there isn't one on the row; it's an accessor). This widget encapsulates the derivation.

delegation.description: The delegation row. Reads .is_pending / .is_active / .is_expired / .is_revoked computed properties.
